info.name: Dal Makhani
info.description: A rich and creamy dal makhani simmered to perfection in a buttery gravy infused with aromatic spices. Serve this decadent dish over steamed basmati rice for a comforting and satisfying meal.

info.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
info.description: Experience the authentic taste of North Indian cuisine with our Paneer Tikka Masala Gravy Bowl. Marinated and grilled paneer is nestled in a spicy gravy that captures the essence of traditional Tikka Masala.

info.name: Chicken Kheema
info.description: Savor the bold flavors of our Chicken Kheema Gravy Bowl, featuring coarsely ground chicken simmered in a flavourful gravy infused with aromatic spices and herbs.

info.name: Smoked Butter Chicken
info.description: Savor the taste of traditional North Indian cuisine with our Smoked Butter Chicken Gravy Bowl. Tender smoked chicken is simmered in a rich, creamy gravy and aromatic spices.

info.name: Masala Arbi
info.description:
(No Onion, No Garlic & Made with Sendha Namak)
Soft, mildly spiced arbi that pairs well with any fasting meal.

info.name: Lucknowi Chicken Tikka Dum Biryani With Kebab & Beverage Combo
info.description:
A delicious trio featuring delicious Lucknowi Chicken Tikka Dum Biryani, Chicken Tikki Kebab, and two refreshing Lemon Sodas.
 (Energy: 2184KCal, Carbohydrates: 178gm, Proteins: 77gm, Fats: 124gm, Sodium: 4726mg)

info.name: Flavourful Combo
info.description:
Smoked Butter Chicken, flavorful Chicken Kheema, and succulent Tandoori Chicken Tikka, served with parathas and rice for a delicious feast.
 (Energy: 3248KCal, Carbohydrates: 184gm, Proteins: 127gm, Fats: 249gm, Sodium: 1692mg)

info.name: Veg Delight
info.description: Indulge in the perfect blend of smoky Tandoori Paneer Tikka and hearty Rajma Masala, paired with soft, flaky parathas. A flavor-packed feast for you! (Energy: 1942KCal, Carbohydrates: 212gm, Proteins: 41gm, Fats: 133gm, Sodium: 3480mg)

info.description: Savor the bold, charred flavors of Tandoori Chicken Tikka alongside the spiced goodness of Chicken Kheema. Paired with parathas, it's a celebration in every bite! (Energy: 2398KCal, Carbohydrates: 152gm, Proteins: 86gm, Fats: 190gm, Sodium: 1671mg)

info.name: Non-Veg Delight
info.description: Relish the irresistible flavors of Smoked Butter Chicken and flavorful Chicken Kheema, perfectly complemented with warm parathas. A treat that adds sizzle to your lunch spread! (Energy: 2347KCal, Carbohydrates: 131gm, Proteins: 76gm, Fats: 199gm, Sodium: 846mg)

info.name: Hyderabadi Chicken Dum Biryani With Kebab & Beverage Combo
info.description:
Experience the royal flavors of Hyderabad with our signature Chicken Dum Biryani, paired with juicy Chicken Tikki Kebab and two refreshing Lemon Sodas. A regal treat for your taste buds!

info.description: Dive into the bold flavors of our Chicken Lababdar Gravy Bowl, where tender chicken is cooked in a creamy  curry that is bursting with authentic spices.

info.name: Chicken Tikki Kebab (8-pcs)
info.description: Introducing our Murgh Koobideh- juicy, ground chicken infused with cardamom & green chilli, shallow-fried for tender-crisp perfection! (Energy: 688KCal, Carbohydrates: 25gm, Proteins: 55gm, Fats: 40gm, Sodium: 1292mg)

info.name: Mutton Haleem
info.description: A royal treat for your Ramzan feast! Our Mutton Haleem is made with succulent mutton, slow-cooked with wheat, lentils, and a blend of authentic spices for a rich, creamy, and soul-satisfying experience.

info.name: Chicken Tikki Kebab (5-pcs)
info.description: Introducing our Murgh Koobideh- juicy, ground chicken infused with cardamom & green chilli, shallow-fried for tender-crisp perfection! (Energy: 466KCal, Carbohydrates: 19gm, Proteins: 35gm, Fats: 27gm, Sodium: 941mg)

info.name: Chicken Meatball Kebab (5-Pcs)
info.description: Relish succulent minced chicken infused with aromatic Indian spices. Elevate your dining experience with our Murgh Kefta. (Energy: 348KCal, Carbohydrates: 18gm, Proteins: 18gm, Fats: 22gm, Sodium: 959mg)

info.name: Chicken Meatball Kebab (8-pcs)
info.description: Enjoy juicy minced chicken infused with aromatic Indian spices. Elevate your dining experience with our Murgh Kefta. (Energy: 498KCal, Carbohydrates: 24gm, Proteins: 29gm, Fats: 31gm, Sodium: 1322mg)

info.name: Dahi Kebab ( 4-Pcs)
info.description: Begin your meal with our yogurt-infused dahi kebabs. Made with creamy yoghurt, gently spiced, and crispy-fried to reveal a soft, velvety interior! (Energy: 323KCal, Carbohydrates: 16gm, Proteins: 18gm, Fats: 20gm, Sodium: 44mg)

info.name: Sabudana Vada  (4 Pcs) & Green Chutney
info.description: Crispy Sabudana Vadas made with soaked Sabudana, mashed Potatoes and Peanuts. Served with green chutney. Light, crunchy and perfect for your Vrat cravings. (Energy: 515KCal, Carbohydrates: 59gm, Proteins: 4gm, Fats: 28gm, Sodium: 940mg)

info.name: Mutton Kefta Kilo Biryani
info.description: A grand serving of Lucknowi or Hyderabadi Mutton Kefta Biryani. Each bite is an invitation to experience the rich, elegant flavors of two iconic cuisines, turning every gathering into a royal celebration. Serves 2-3

info.name: Chicken Kilo Biryani
info.description: Elevate your feast with our generous serving of Lucknowi or Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani, where every bite is infused with layers of rich, aromatic spices and succulent chicken. Serves 2 -3.

info.name: Paneer Kilo Biryani
info.description: Host the ultimate Biryani Party with our Lucknowi or Hyderabadi Paneer Biryani, offering a royal blend of flavors that will elevate your gathering with every mouthful. Serves 2-3.

info.name: Veg Kilo Biryani
info.description: Enjoy a regal feast with Veg Hyderabadi or Veg Lucknowi Biryani, where aromatic spices, fresh vegetables, and fragrant rice come together for an unforgettable experience. Serves 2-3.

info.name: Egg Kilo Biryani
info.description: A majestic blend of delicate Lucknowi spices or bold Hyderabadi zest, this generous portion of these Egg Biyani, delivers rich, aromatic flavors that will leave every guest savoring every bite. Serves 2-3.

info.name: Mutton Kefta Biryani - Serves 1
info.description: Experience the grandeur of a royal feast with Lucknowi and Hyderabadi Mutton Kefta Biryani, where every bite envelops you in rich & elegant flavors. Serves 1

info.name: Chicken Biryani-Serves 1
info.description: A fusion of royal tastes awaits with our Lucknowi and Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani, where delicate spices from Lucknow or fiery kick of Hyderabad will feed your cravings perfectly! Serves 1.

info.name: Veg Biryani - Serves 1
info.description: Relish the majestic Flavours of Veg Hyderabadi or Veg Lucknowi Biryani, A perfect blend of aromatic flavours, vegetables and aromatic rice. Serves 1.

info.name: Paneer Biryani - Serves 1
info.description: From the regal Lucknowi to the bold Hyderabadi, every bite of any of the two Paneer Biryanis' will take you on a flavorful journey. Serves 1.

info.name: Egg Biryani - Serves 1
info.description: A majestic blend of delicate Lucknowi spices or bold Hyderabadi zest, this generous portion of these Egg Biyani, delivers rich, aromatic flavors that will leave every guest savoring every bite. Serves 2-3.

info.description: Treat your taste buds to a delightful adventure with Paneer Biryani and Thums Up, a combo that will leave you craving for more!

info.name: Chicken Biryani(Boneless) + Thums Up Toofani Combo
info.description: Savor the irresistible taste of our Chicken Biryani, cooked to perfection with fragrant rice and tender chicken, best enjoyed with an ice-cold Thumbs Up.

info.name: Egg Mini Biryani Bowl
info.description: Perfectly boiled eggs, aromatic rice, and a medley of spices make this bowl a winner. Customize your bowl with either the delicate Lucknowi touch or the vibrant Hyderabadi twist!

info.name: Veg Mini Biryani Bowl
info.description: Dive into the aromatic symphony of fresh veggies, slow-cooked with fragrant basmati rice in a blend of exotic spices. Choose between the subtle Lucknowi taste or the fiery Hyderabadi charm to suit your mood!

info.name: Paneer Mini Biryani Bowl
info.description: Soft, juicy paneer cubes meet aromatic rice and spices for a vegetarian classic. Select Lucknowi for a royal treat or Hyderabadi for bold flavors.

info.name: Chicken Mini Biryani Bowl
info.description: Experience the irresistible flavors of tender chicken layered with flavorful rice and authentic spices. Whether you prefer the royal Lucknowi aroma or the spicy Hyderabadi kick, this bowl promises an unforgettable feast!

info.name: Mutton Kefta Mini Biryani Bowl
info.description: Juicy mutton koftas with your choice of rice... rich and fragrant or bold and spicy, a perfect match for every mood.
